name: onesto
title: Onesto
description: Italian e-invoicing and taxes with Onesto: browse unpaid invoices, issue electronic invoices to SDI, track tax deadlines and F24s.
author: albertopisaroni

commands.name: unpaid-invoices
commands.title: Unpaid Invoices
commands.subtitle: Onesto
commands.description: Browse open and overdue invoices, open PDFs and register payments.

commands.name: create-invoice
commands.title: Create Invoice
commands.subtitle: Onesto
commands.description: Issue a new electronic invoice and (optionally) send it to SDI.

commands.name: tax-deadlines
commands.title: Tax Deadlines
commands.subtitle: Onesto
commands.description: Overdue and upcoming tax deadlines, with F24 PDFs and mark-as-paid.

commands.name: sdi-issues
commands.title: SDI Issues
commands.subtitle: Onesto
commands.description: Invoices rejected or in error at the Italian exchange system (SDI).

commands.name: create-client
commands.title: Create Client
commands.subtitle: Onesto
commands.description: Add a new client from its VAT number (automatic lookup) or manually.

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Onesto Status
commands.subtitle: Onesto
commands.description: Unpaid invoices total and tax deadlines, always visible in your menu bar.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Dedicated Raycast key generated in Onesto → Integrazioni ('Onesto per Raycast' card). The key is limited in scope, expires after 1 year and can be revoked at any time.
